content.text:
I understand. I'm ready to help you explore the MMS (Metro Integrated Planning System) codebase and design implementation plans. This is a read-only planning task - I will only use tools to explore and understand the codebase, not to make any modifications.

To get started, I should first read the key harness files to understand the current state of the project:

1. `claude-progress.txt` - Session history
2. `features.json` - Requirements with status

What would you like me to help you plan or explore in this codebase?
